user.title: CoachSanté
user.description: Add one entry per person. Each person gets their own webhook, their own device and their own entities.

credentials.title: Settings for the iOS app
credentials.description:
Copy these two values into the CoachSanté app on {person}'s iPhone. **The secret is shown only once.**

**Webhook URL**
```
{url}
```

**Shared secret**
```
{secret}
```

The app signs every request with this secret (`X-CoachSante-Signature`). If you lose it, remove the entry and create it again.

abort.already_configured: This person is already set up.

data_description.photo_retention: Older photos are deleted from disk beyond this count. 0 keeps everything.

add_nutrition.name: Add nutrition
add_nutrition.description: Adds a meal's macros to the day's counters. Meant to be called by the automation that analyses the meal photo.

label.name: Label
label.description: Short description of the meal, shown by the "Last meal" sensor.

reset_day.name: Reset the day
reset_day.description: Sets today's nutrition counters back to zero.

entry_not_loaded.message: The CoachSanté entry for {person} is not loaded.

no_nutrient_provided.message: Provide at least one nutrient to add.
